text.title: stream-json-orchestration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stream-json-orchestration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Reading agent output as one big JSON blob at end.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Switch to stream-json; parse per line.

failure-mode.description: Using regex on plain-text output to detect tool calls.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use the structured stream — robust across model versions.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use line-buffered reads plus a queue; backpressure when downstream slow.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defense in depth: hard cap plus allowlist plus monitor stream events.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always handle the final event — that is your "done, with summary".
